title: jatropha urens var. herbacea
intro: Jatropha urens var. herbacea, also known as the lesser stinking niterwort, is a plant species of the Jatropha genus, characterized by its small, round leaves and red or green flowers. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Jatropha urens var. herbacea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and ointments, which are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
